rationale: Review 2 catches that AffineAlgGroup itself bundles finiteType and geomReduced in violation of a roadmap 'Don't bundle' directive (visible in diff lines 34–38), while Review 1 mistakenly calls those foundations 'plausibly-legitimate' and recommends keeping them. Acting on Review 1 would produce a split PR that still ships a design-violating bundled typeclass; acting on Review 2 fixes that too.
